transcript.text:
It's around 2.4kg for 6...
Just the noodles weigh 2.4kg?!
(Today's dish weighs over 2.4kg just with the noodles...)
(Moreover, it's 100% handmade!)
(My heart's racing...)
(These plump noodles are becoming complete quickly)
(With great visuals,)
(these are 6 kinds of traditional Japanese udon!)
I need to eat them quickly before the noodles become soggy!
(Quickly, quickly, quickly...)
(On another level of noodle-slurping...)
(You're kinda scaring me, ma'am...)
Hello, everyone
Today, I'm here at Haengdang-dong
(I'm eating udon today!) to eat udon
And this udon restaurant

is run by an expert who makes traditional Japanese udon
(Numerous reviews acknowledge the taste!) If you see the reviews, they say the noodles are amazing...
(Already full of hope...!) I wonder how delicious the noodles are!
Ta-da, it's right over there
("Yamatani Udon" Seongdong-gu, Seoul)
(Entering!) Hello!
Are you on break time right now?
(The owner gladly allowed me to film even during break time...!) Really?! Thank you
(You're welcome) No need to thank me!
I heard this place is super delicious...
- It's my first time eating traditional Japanese udon - I know
(Already done scanning) I looked it up, and I couldn't find a video of it
(We are more thankful) It's an honor
(You can see the owner's reasonable skills all over the restaurant...!)
Normally, if people want a lot of portions,
we give it to them without holding back

(Please give me gigantic portions...) I heard if you order an extra large, you get this much food
(The menu board is here!) Thank you
(The dishes of "Yamatani") What is Kake udon?
Kake udon is basically the most basic udon
(Found cold udon, her favorite!) I love cold udon and they have it here!
(Cannot calm down) What should I eat? It makes me contemplate...
(Even forgot about her camera...)
- (Are you okay...?) - Maybe you're too excited
Could you give me recommendations?
You can have something with soup to start with
(Recommended Kamatama and Curry udon!)
(+ Kake udon + Kamatama udon + Curry udon + Kake Tamagotoji udon + Bukkake udon)
+ Shoyu udon! I'll have these
+ two shrimp and onsen tamago
+ and two fried fish cakes, please!
(Mental confusion...)

(Done ordering)
(Revealing the identity of the rumored noodles)
(100% handmade noodles!)
(The plump and chewy noodles can be felt through the screen)
(Kamatama udon mixes the egg to the noodles in advance)
(Angake kamagotoji udon has eggs stirred into the soup)
(Curry udon & Kake udon)
(And the tempura is as great as the udon)
(Tempura is complete as well!)
(Gather in front of Tzuyang...!)
Thank you!
This is Bukkake udon!
Shoyu udon!
(They're all here!) I need to eat it quickly before the noodles turn soggy!
Unlike ordinary udon,
the Kake udon is served with garnish separately

(Adds it right away) A bit of green onion...Like this!
I'll try the basic udon first, this is called Kake udon
A bite of Kake udon first!
I'm so curious of the noodles!
Wow, the noodles are really chewy
(Cannot contain her excitement) It's so delicious! One more bite...And the noodles are so long!
(Looooooong)
I'll hold two strands like this,
and it's still very long
I'll place one strand here
(Huh?)
It's filled with just one strand!
This Kamatama first...
Oh, I need to eat this one first?!
I ate this one first
It's okay! It doesn't matter

(Then let's try it right away!)
(Added elasticity by rinsing it in cold water, for Kamatama udon, the noodles come out right away)
(So you need to eat it first before it becomes soggy!)
(Kamatama udon has been coated with raw eggs) The noodles have eggs coating them
It's like egg noodles... How should I explain this?
(She goes in for another bite first...)
The noodles are so chewy and so good
And compared to normal udon, the noodles are slightly thick
It's so delicious!
(Time to eat tempura!) I really wanted to try the tempura from a while ago, from the start
Am I supposed to dip this in something? Salt? Like this?
How cool! It's salt instead of soy sauce...?
(Strongly recommends the shrimp tempura...!) If you come here, please try the shrimp tempura!
The fried layer is bloomed like a flower, in Japanese style
It's very thin and crunchy
The shrimp inside is very plump as well

(Definitely recommends the shrimp tempura)
It's my first time eating udon that is like this
(Finished it already...?)
Should I try the fish cake tempura too?
The fried layer is really good...!
The best!
Huh?
(Next is Shoyu udon!) Should I try the cold udon?
Add soy sauce like this
(That much...?)
(Let's drizzle it...) I can drizzle this much? How cool...
(A bit of lemon!)
(And mix...) Mix this one too
The noodles are so long!!
(Emergency measures) Should I cut these noodles once?
(MISSION COMPLETE) Good!

(Awesome)
Sir! Where should I add the egg to get the best taste?
- It tastes best if you add it to Bukkake or Shoyu - Bukkake or Shoyu?
Thank you!
Shoyu udon is really delicious
because the noodles are plumper and chewier,
which makes the noodles taste even more delicious
Why is it so delicious? :O
(The cold udon lover acknowledges the taste of Shoyu udon) For cold udon, I only tried those with soup in it
It kinda feels like buckwheat soba noodles
With katsuobushi, with deep miso soup,
the noodles are so chewy
(Very delicious) so it's really good!
(Onsen tamago goes in!) Pour the egg! It's onsen tamago
Onsen
Do I burst it and mix it?

(A waterfall of yellow yolk...!) Awesome!
(Not salty at all, the soy sauce is a stroke of genius!) It's more delicious with added soy sauce!
(Tiny bit) It's more delicious!
With the egg,
it's more delicious, it becomes savory
A bite of tempura!
(Food genius) It'll be good if you soak it in the soup like this
(Like tempura udon!) Udon comes with tempura on top like this!
Wow...! It's even more delicious...!
Crunchiness and moistness coexist!
(You can even jump rope with it...) The noodles are so long!
One noodle!
(Fact check) I'll show you how long this is!
(Streeeeeeeetch)
(She even stands up...?!)
(It's at least 75cm long!) I think it's about half my height

(I love it) I'm liking this!
Just eating one strand is filling
The soup has a very strong katsuobushi scent
(She's having fun now LOLOL) It's so fun eating one strand at a time!
(Kake udon, CLEARED!) I ate it all!
(Shoyu udon) This is the real deal! It's so good
It's definitely different than ordinary udon
The way you eat it is different as well
(Grab a fish cake tempura!)
(Food genius...2) I feel like it'll taste good with tempura bits
It's right here
(The producer made a huge mistake...) Why didn't you tell me!
Tempura bits!
(Came back with tempura) I think it'll be so good if you eat it together!
(In goes the tempura...!!!) I can't believe I didn't know this...
(Still salty) Maybe something else...

- Picked radish - I didn't know...
I don't need pickled radish
(I knew it would be delicious)
(Here's a freebie!) Thank you! Thank you!
Wow, seriously,
you have to add these in!
There's an addition of slightly greasy and savory taste,
so it's much better
(Next is Bukkake udon!!) I should change it with this one and eat it
Sprinkle a bit of lemon
Sir!
- I'd like another onsen tamago - One onsen tamago?
Thank you!
Wow, by the way, how do you make this?
Can I ask them? Is it a secret?
If you dunk it in onsen water temp for a few minutes, it comes out like this

(Curiosity solved) Is that so?
Where did you learn this?
- I learned it when I was working in Japan - Really?
(Place onsen tamago on top!)
(The yolk blooms...!!)
(Not Bukkake) It's less seasoned than Shoyu udon
But adding soy sauce is more delicious for me!
I'm adding it in!
(Fish out the noodles first!) I'll place it here for a sec!
(Sprinkling tempura bits!)
How does the Curry udon taste?
Let's have a bite
(The curry scent comes up subtly) I love the curry scent!
It's good!
Mmmm
Wow, I really recommend this one too,

because the noodles are so good, they're so chewy
(I got a good idea!) I'll add this into here too!
(Magical tempura bits that are delicious if added anywhere!) Add them in!
(A definite win) Seriously, this would taste good if added anywhere
All the noodles here are handmade
And fascinatingly, it takes 15 minutes to boil the noodles
Actually udon noodles are cooked pretty quickly,
(Please wait a little for the sake of the taste) but you have to wait a little to eat here
(Bringing the last Angake Kamagotoji udon up front!)
(A huge accident)
(Dummy)
(The noodles are still plump!) The noodles didn't turn soggy yet!
This feels like some kind of egg soup
(The soup is thick because they added eggs in it) Look how thick the soup is
It's so thick!
The noodles are so good...

(Japan's representative seasoning, "Shichimi") This is called "Shichimi"
(Dried red pepper powder dominates the dish!) Is it similar to red pepper powder in Korea?
Sprinkle a bit of it
(Eating spree takes away her soul...)
(Yamatani Udon, CLEARED!) That was a great meal!
Personally,
if I visit next time,
I think I'll eat Bukkake udon!
I'll add tempura bits on it too!
(Automatically pauses)
Each dish is about 400g,
so it's around 2.4kg for 6...
- Just the noodles weigh 2.4kg? - Yes!
It's about 3kg with the soup...
Really?!
Do you normally get 400g even if you order normally?

(Based on an average adult male...) We give men that much...
- Men would eat this much... - Yes!
Sir, I really enjoyed the meal today
- It was so good! - I'm glad!
The noodles were so chewy
So I was able to enjoy it till the end
Once again!
I had a great meal!
